misc.title: I’d translate it as “Nemesis; Celestial/Divine Judgment Blade,” but the Japanese is ambiguous as to whether that refers to technique or sword itself. Could Imu’s sword be a Black Blade? Its design loo
misc.text: I’d translate it as “Nemesis; Celestial/Divine Judgment Blade,” but the Japanese is ambiguous as to whether that refers to technique or sword itself. Could Imu’s sword be a Black Blade? Its design looks similar to Mihawk’s. Could Mihawk be a descendant of the Nerona family?😍😍

misc.title: 【What if Joy Boy and Imu are actually brothers…?👻】 There may have once been a boundary like this during the Void Century: I(1)mu(6) Ni(2)mu(6) Sa(3)mu(6) Yo(4)mu(6) Go(5)mu(6) Imu as the eldest broth
misc.text: 【What if Joy Boy and Imu are actually brothers…?👻】 There may have once been a boundary like this during the Void Century: I(1)mu(6) Ni(2)mu(6) Sa(3)mu(6) Yo(4)mu(6) Go(5)mu(6) Imu as the eldest brother. And the fifth brother, "Gomu", could actually be the one who awakened Nika’s "Rubber" body power—Joy Boy himself. What if their mother was “Ma-mu”? That would also make it possible that the mother of these brothers was a woman who had relationships with many different men, like Big Mom. So in that case, the eldest son Imu would have Mam as his mother, and the king of the Nerona family as his father. And Gomu—Joy Boy—would also have Mam as his mother, but a different father. Maybe someone from the D bloodline. And I think the face of this mother, Mam, may actually be what Oda-Sensei drew in the author comment section of Volume 62 as the “Mother of Humanity.” And the line Oda-Sensei wrote there was: “Humanity is family.” So far, the story has suggested that Imu and Joy Boy were enemies—but maybe, originally, they were actually brothers. That’s something you could even infer from Oda-Sensei’s comment there.

misc.title: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released
misc.text: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released a breathtaking view of Antarctica Community note: This image is not from NASA. No such photo was released by Artemis II. It appears to be a computer-generated illustration, similar to past CGI examples falsely claimed as NASA photos. nasa.gov/artemis-ii/ earthobservatory.nasa.gov/images apnews.com/article/Fact-c… — https://nitter.net/astrooalert/status/2048190323495403835#m
